paper_title: Measurement techniques and coherency of the dataset

methods.description: This method describes the analytical techniques used to measure δ18O and δD in the EDC1 and EDC2 ice cores, including the transition from uranium reduction and CO2-H2O equilibrium methods to cavity ring-down spectroscopy (CRDS).

steps.description: Initial analytical techniques included a uranium reduction method for δD and a CO2-H2O equilibrium method for δ18O.
steps.searchable_summary: Use uranium reduction for δD and CO2-H2O equilibrium for δ18O measurement

steps.description: The most recent method used to determine δ18O and δD on the EDC2 ice core is cavity ring-down spectroscopy (CRDS).
steps.searchable_summary: Apply CRDS for δ18O and δD measurement

steps.description: An extensive series of comparisons were performed which showed that there was excellent agreement between the two methods within the uncertainty ranges of the instruments.
steps.searchable_summary: Compare CRDS and previous methods for measurement agreement

methods.description: This method uses discrete wavelet analysis to identify contributions to isotopic variability from signals of different periodicities, using R software and the waveslim wavelet package.

steps.description: We produced a multi-resolution analysis (MRA) using R software with the waveslim wavelet package containing the MRA function with a Daubechies orthonormal wavelet filter.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform MRA using R and waveslim package with Daubechies filter

steps.description: We divided the EDC isotopic record on the AICC2012 age scale into six intervals and performed an interpolation with a uniform resolution.
steps.searchable_summary: Interpolate isotopic data at uniform resolution across intervals

steps.description: We concatenated the MRAs with the same temporal resolution, leading to nine successive composites.
steps.searchable_summary: Concatenate MRAs into composites by temporal resolution

methods.description: This method involves comparing isotopic data measured by different analytical techniques on the same samples to assess consistency and potential discrepancies.

steps.description: The CRDS analysis in 2019-2020 measured previously analysed samples from 2004-2010 by uranium reduction for δD and by H2O-CO2 equilibration for δ18O.
steps.searchable_summary: Re-measure samples with CRDS and compare to previous methods

steps.description: Tests were performed by storing low δ18O and δD internal standards for several years in the freezer.
steps.searchable_summary: Test stability of internal standards over time

steps.description: In a comparison of the old and new records, we did not observe systematic increases of δ18O and δD for the samples analysed recently compared to the analyses performed 15 years ago.
steps.searchable_summary: Compare old and new isotopic records for systematic differences
